# py-sse

> Minimal application wrapper for granian

- [app](/app): body, header_values, body_stream, signals, set_cookie, create_relay, create_signer, static, create_app, serve
- [sse](/sse): patch_elements, patch_signals, remove_signals, execute_script
- [mserver](/mserver): ServerState, serve_background, stop_background, dev_alive, request_logger
- [ngrok](/ngrok): TunnelState, load_env, start_tunnel, stop_tunnel

- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Complete source code
